name: Set of Desk Drawer Organizers - Threshold™
description:
Keep clutter under control with this Set of Desk Drawer Organizers from Threshold™. This organizer set helps you separate pens, paper clips and more so everything stays easy to find. The clean design works well in home offices, study spaces or shared workstations. Made with recycled plastic, the pieces offer a practical way to organize, and they're sized to fit neatly inside most drawers.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
